name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: Use the Sidecar command to offload Codex planning and repository analysis to ChatGPT before a Codex model turn.

interface.shortDescription: Send Codex planning work to ChatGPT
interface.longDescription: Provides a Sidecar skill and hook that gather the active Codex thread and repository context, open a prepared ChatGPT handoff, and block the Codex model turn.
defaultPrompt: $sidecar plan the safest implementation for the next requested feature
$sidecar debug the current failure without changing files
$sidecar review the current working tree and staged changes
